title: podman-docker: Support for Docker Scout plugin
body:
### Feature request description

Hey,

I see that the podman-docker shim supports some bare bones Docker commands. But for security, it would be really helpful to support `docker scout cves -e [fs://<host-path>, <image>]`.

### Suggest potential solution

Enhance podman-docker so that it is able to run the Docker Scout plugin identically with ordinary Docker.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

Using plain Docker.

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
